base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hazards — a effect_layer from 1992 super mario kart. Track hazards — Piranha Plants/Thwomps/Monty Moles/item-boxes/oil-slicks. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
